description:
Churn is the percentage of paid subscriptions that were lost during a given period and never resubscribed.

Actives measures the number of paid subscriptions at the beginning of a a given period, while Churned Actives measures the paid subscriptions that have expired within the period (minus any that have resubscribed).

A stable or declining churn rate indicates a healthy, growing business. However, keep in mind that churn can be relatively high for mobile apps when compared to web SaaS products.

measures.description: The number of un-expired subscriptions at the beginning of the period.
The number of subscriptions that expired in the period and did not renew, minus any previously expired subscribers that re-subscribed.
The proportion of subscriptions active at the beginning of the period that expired in the period and did not renew.
